---
name: "🔒 Security Vulnerability Report"
about: Please do not open public reports for critical vulnerabilities. Follow this template to disclose responsibly.
title: "[SECURITY] "
labels: security
assignees: ""
---

### Core Security Concern
Please state the specific attack vector, vulnerability (e.g. key leakage, replay bypass), or weakness.

### Severity Assessment
- [ ] Critical (Full remote execution / decryption)
- [ ] High (Impersonation / Local state manipulation)
- [ ] Medium (Localized traffic sniffing / DoS)
- [ ] Low (Unused legacy code leak)

### Proof of Concept (PoC)
Detail steps or provide automated scripts to recreate the exploit safely in a controlled lab scenario.
